heroHeadline: Ukraine: 1,144 Years of History, Sovereignty, and War
heroSubtitle: From Kyivan Rus to the ongoing Russian full-scale invasion — the complete intelligence record of a nation fighting for survival
footerNote: Data sourced from official government reports, UN monitoring missions, major international outlets, and institutional analyses. Historical data draws on peer-reviewed scholarship. Casualty figures are contested; ranges reflect scholarly and official estimates.
